raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "ja: Wiꞥſch griboohts tohs iſdel-\
deht/ ja Mohſus winna Iſweh-\
lehts prett to Plihſunu preeſch\
winna Waiga ne buhtu ſtah-\
wejs / ka tas winna Bahrsibu\
nowehrſtu/ ka wiꞥſch ne famat-\
tatu.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee nizzinaja to mihligu\
Semmi/ tee ne tizzeja winna\
Wahrdaın.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kurneja eekſch fa-\
wahm Zeltim/ un ne paklautija\
ta KUNGA Balfim.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz pazehle wiꞥſch\
pretti teem ſawu Rohku / ka\
wiꞥſch tohs nofiſtu Tuḱſneſi.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nogahſtu winnu\
Dsimmunu ſtarp teem Pağa-\
neem / un iſkaititu tohs ſtarp\
Semmeım.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee peekehrahs arridsan\
Baal-Pearam/ un ehde to No-\
mirruſchu Uppneus.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un apkaitinaja (to KUN-\
GU) ar ſaweeım Darbeem / tad\
eelauſahs arridsan ta Mohziba\
ſtarp winneem.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs Pineas/ un\
falihdsinaja to atkaſ/ un ta Moh-\
ziba mittejahs.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas tappe winnam\
par Taifnibu peelihdsinahts us\
Behrnu Behrneem muhscham.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee apkaitinaja winnu\
pee Bahrtchanas-Uhdens / un\
Mohſum winnu deht labbi ne\
flahjahs.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tee padarrija winna\
Garru ſeunnign/ ka wiꞥſch ne-\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee arri ne famaitaja\
tahs Tautas/ ka tas KUNGS\
teem bıj pawehlejs.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee fajauzahs ar teem\
Baganeem/ un mahzia to pa-\
fchu Darbus.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee kalpoja winnu El-\
keim/ un tee tappe winneem par\
Walgu.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir ſawus Dehlus un ſa-\
was Meitas uppureja tee teem\
Welleım.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un iſlehje nenoseedſigu\
Affini / ſawu Dehlu un ſawu\
Meitu Affini / ko tee Kanāına\
Elkeım uppureja/ ta ka ta Sem-\
me zaor Affins-Wainahm ap-\
gahnta tappe.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee fagahnijahs ar ſa-\
weeım Darbeem/ un maukoja ar\
ſawahın Darrischanahım.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pahr to tas KUNGS\
fohti eedufmojahs prett ſaweeım\
Landim/ un turreja par Negan-\
tibu ſawu eemantojamu Teeſu.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nodeve tohs teem Ba-\
gabeem Rohkâ/ un winnu Nih-\
detaji walduja pahr teem.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winnu Eenaidneeki\
apbehdinaja tohs/ un paſemino-\
ja tohs appakſch ſawas Rohkas.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch iſglahbe tohs\
dasch daschadi/ tatschu tee apkai-\
tinaja winnu ar ſawu Padohmu/\
un iſnihke ſawu Noſcegunu\
deht.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatschu uſtuhkoja tas\
Ecccccc win-\n"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
